spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the type safety of multiplying length dimensions by unitless mathematical exponents (pow).

interactive.rationale: Dynamic sliders allow immediate adjustments to the base height and ratio multiplier in real time.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligns with the feature's core introduction and description.

edge_cases.rationale: Gracefully checks for capability support of typed math function calculation in the current browser.

references.rationale: Includes links to ChromeStatus entries and technical spec drafts.

design_system.rationale: Fully complies with style system design tokens.

summary: A clean, straightforward baseline concept validating typed arithmetic in calc() when multiplying dimensioned length by a unitless power exponent.
